title: HD9 7AZ, Yorkshire Water Services Limited: surrender issued - EPR/KP3536LL/S004
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter and site condition report evaluation template for:   Operator name: Yorkshire Water Services Limited Installation name: Neiley Sludge Treatment Facility Permit number: EPR/KP3536LL  "
